listedCompanies.basis: Samsung listed-company universe recorded in raw/manifests/samsung.identifier-verification.json and configs/groups.json.
listedCompanies.paperUse: Scope universe only; runtime source-backed claims require document-level source extraction.

firstReferenceLayerCompanies.basis: Local IR PDFs plus DART viewer filings supplied for initial Samsung reference-layer ingestion.

companyCoverage.coverage: 2024 Q4 through 2026 Q1 earnings presentation PDFs
companyCoverage.gap: Needs DART business reports or audited annual reports for source-backed 2022-2024 historical financial claims.

companyCoverage.coverage: 2024 Q4 through 2026 Q1 earnings presentation PDFs
companyCoverage.gap: Needs DART business reports or audited annual reports for source-backed 2022-2024 historical financial claims.

companyCoverage.coverage: 2025 business report, connected/separate audit and review reports, shareholder letters, and 2026 Q1 PPT/subtitle substitute materials
companyCoverage.gap: Recording/non-text evidence is excluded unless transcript, subtitle, PPT, report PDF, or DART filing text is available.

companyCoverage.coverage: 2024 and 2025 business/audit reports plus recent earnings and operating reports
companyCoverage.gap: Needs 2022-2023 official annual evidence only if the paper uses multi-year financial history.

companyCoverage.coverage: DART viewer URLs for 2024 annual and 2025 quarterly/annual filings
companyCoverage.gap: Can proceed without local PDFs, but extraction must use DART document/filing pipeline.

companyCoverage.coverage: DART viewer URLs for 2024 annual and 2025 quarterly/annual filings
companyCoverage.gap: Can proceed without local PDFs, but extraction must use DART document/filing pipeline.

qualityFindings.finding: Samsung C&T recording/non-text material is excluded from markdown/RAG/wiki evidence.
qualityFindings.action: Use PPT, subtitle, report PDF, transcript, or DART filing text as the knowledge source; retain non-text media only as metadata if needed.

qualityFindings.finding: The DART API table now covers the 15-company 2022-2024 universe, but financial-sector revenue remains partial where OpenDART does not expose a comparable revenue account.
qualityFindings.action: Define an explicit finance-company account policy or add report-level evidence before promoting cross-industry revenue comparison claims.

dartViewerVerification.note: The 2024 annual report was verified with a narrower March 2025 OpenDART list query.

paperUsePolicy: Use these sources to begin Samsung's first source-backed reference layer.
Do not cite the local package as complete Samsung coverage.
Do not promote any claim until file validity, source role, period, reporting basis, and source URL are recorded.
DART viewer URLs are acceptable official public-source references for Samsung Life and Samsung Fire where issuer IR sites do not expose stable static downloads.
